description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) at a cloud infrastructure company responding to a PagerDuty alert for anomalous CPU behavior. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'SRE Incident Response' featuring a graph titled 'EC2 Fleet CPU Correlation'. The graph must include individual smoothed curves for servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization, and servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization, each wrapped in a movingAverage() function with a window of 10. Additionally, include a fleet-wide average baseline using averageSeries() across all three CPU metrics.
